records.name: Accordion
records.summary: The accordion component lets users show and hide sections of related content on a page

records.name: Addresses
records.summary: Help users provide an address

records.name: Back link
records.summary: Use the back link component to help users go back to the previous page in a multi-page transaction

records.name: Bank details
records.summary: How to ask users for their bank details

records.name: Breadcrumbs
records.summary: Help users orientate themselves and navigate pages within a hierarchical structure

records.name: Button
records.summary: Use the button component to help users carry out an action

records.name: Character count
records.summary: Tell users how many characters or words they can enter into a textarea

records.name: Check a service is suitable
records.summary: Ask users questions to help them work out if they can or should use your service

records.name: Check answers
records.summary: Let users check their answers before submitting information to a service

records.name: Checkboxes
records.summary: Let users select one or more options by using the checkboxes component

records.name: Complete multiple tasks
records.summary: Task lists help users understand tasks involved in completing a transaction, the order they should complete tasks in and when they have completed tasks

records.name: Confirm a phone number
records.summary: Identifying users when they sign in

records.name: Confirm an email address
records.summary: Use an email confirmation loop to check that a user has access to a specific email

records.name: Confirmation pages
records.summary: Let users know they’ve completed a transaction

records.name: Contact a department or service team
records.summary: Contact a department or service team

records.name: Cookie banner
records.summary: Allow users to accept or reject cookies which are not essential to making your service work.

records.name: Cookies page
records.summary: Tell users about the cookies you’re setting on their device and let them accept or reject different types of non-essential cookies.

records.name: Create a username
records.summary: Help users to create a unique and memorable username to sign into a service with

records.name: Create accounts
records.summary: Help users create an account for your service

records.name: Date input
records.summary: Use the date input component to help users enter a memorable date

records.name: Dates
records.summary: Help users enter or select a date

records.name: Details
records.summary: Make a page easier to scan by letting users reveal more detailed information only if they need it

records.name: Email addresses
records.summary: Help users enter a valid email address

records.name: Equality information
records.summary: This pattern explains how to ask users for equality information

records.name: Error message
records.summary: When there's a validation error, use an error message to explain what went wrong and how to fix it

records.name: Error summary
records.summary: Use an error summary when there is a validation error

records.name: Exit a page quickly
records.summary: Give users a way to quickly and safely exit a service, website or application.

records.name: Exit this page
records.summary: Give users a way to quickly and safely exit a service, website or application.

records.name: Fieldset
records.summary: Use the fieldset component to group related form inputs

records.name: File upload
records.summary: Help users select and upload a file

records.name: GOV.UK footer
records.summary: The footer provides copyright, licensing and other information about your service and department

records.name: Generic header
records.summary: A generic header to help services not on GOV.UK

records.name: GOV.UK header
records.summary: The GOV.UK header shows users that they are on GOV.UK

records.name: Inset text
records.summary: Use the inset text component to differentiate a block of text from the content that surrounds it

records.name: Interruption pages
records.summary: Pause the user journey to give them important information

records.name: Names
records.summary: Help users correctly enter their name

records.name: National Insurance numbers
records.summary: Ask users to provide their National Insurance number

records.name: Navigate a service
records.summary: Help users know they’re using your service and navigate around it

records.name: Notification banner
records.summary: Use a notification banner to tell the user about something they need to know about, but that’s not directly related to the page content

records.name: Page not found pages
records.summary: A page not found tells someone we cannot find the page they were trying to view. They are also known as 404 pages.

records.name: Pagination
records.summary: Help users navigate collections of numbered pages like search results

records.name: Panel
records.summary: Use the Panel component to display important information in within confirmation and interruption pages

records.name: Password input
records.summary: Help users accessibly enter passwords

records.name: Passwords
records.summary: Help users to create and enter secure and memorable passwords

records.name: Payment card details
records.summary: How to ask users for their payment card details

records.name: Phase banner
records.summary: Use the phase banner component to show users your service is still being worked on

records.name: Phone numbers
records.summary: Help users enter a valid phone number

records.name: There is a problem with the service pages
records.summary: This is a page that tells someone there is something wrong with the service. They are also known as 500 pages

records.name: Question pages
records.summary: Follow this pattern whenever you need to ask users questions within your service

records.name: Radios
records.summary: Let users select a single option from a list using the radios component

records.name: Select
records.summary: Help users select an item from a list

records.name: Service navigation
records.summary: Service navigation helps users understand that they’re using your service and lets them navigate around your service

records.name: Service unavailable pages
records.summary: This is a page that tells someone a service is unavailable. It should say when the service will be available or what to do if it is permanently closed

records.name: Skip link
records.summary: Use the skip link component to help keyboard-only users skip to the main content on a page

records.name: Start using a service
records.summary: Create a starting point for your digital service on GOV.UK

records.name: Step by step navigation
records.summary: A starting point for your digital service on GOV.UK

records.name: Summary list
records.summary: Use the summary list to summarise information, for example, a user’s responses at the end of a form.

records.name: Table
records.summary: Use the table component to make information easier to compare and scan for users

records.name: Tabs
records.summary: Tabs can be a helpful way of letting users quickly switch between related information

records.name: Tag
records.summary: The Tag component indicates the status of something, such as an item on a task list or a phase banner

records.name: Task list
records.summary: The task list component displays all the tasks a user needs to do, and allows users to easily identify which ones are done and which they still need to do.

records.name: Text input
records.summary: Help users enter information with the text input component

records.name: Textarea
records.summary: Help users provide detailed information using the textarea component

records.name: Understand the impact of an emergency on your service
Recover from validation errors
records.summary: Check the answers users give to make sure they’re valid - and if there’s an error, tell them what's wrong and how to fix it

records.name: Warning text
records.summary: Use the warning text component when you need to warn users about something important, such as legal consequences of an action, or lack of action, that they might take
